extensions.schema_choice_note: Authoritative self-declaration for the TokenPak companion (pre-send optimizer attached to Claude Code TUI/CLI). Schema: client-profile per DECISION-SC-04-A (Kevin 2026-04-22). The companion is an auxiliary attached to a Claude Code client, not a standalone client; client-profile with mode=tui is the closest-fit kind. A dedicated companion-profile schema would be additive in a future TIP MINOR bump.
extensions.sync_enforcement: SC-06 test asserts one-to-one sync between the capabilities array in this file and SELF_CAPABILITIES_COMPANION.
